form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently 3rd of 13 at this track on April 2 over 1000m, 0.8 len behind Opal Storm carrying 57kg at $5. The start before that 2nd of 8 at Newcastle All Weather on March 11 over 1000m, 1.3 len behind Little Mi Mi with 56.5kg at $3.50. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after nine months second last of 11 at this track on March 14 over 1200m, 9 len behind Mount Ruapehu carrying 61kg at $19. Previously second-up 6th of 16 at Doncaster on June 7 over 1400m, 10 len behind Remmooz with 56.5kg at $151. Still early in the prep and might need more time.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up 2nd in a small field at this track on March 13 over 1000m, nose behind Seven Fires with 53.5kg at $9.50. Last start 2nd of 11 at this track on March 28 over 1000m, 1.75 len behind Ancient State with 56kg at $9. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Last start 3rd of 7 at Nottingham on April 8 over 1000m, 0.5 len behind Glory Fighter carrying 55kg at $4. Before that 5th of 7 at Chelmsford on March 26 over 1000m, 4 len behind Skellig Isle carrying 56.5kg at $4.60. Rates highly and is one of the major players.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung badly right-handed on the bend.

form.formComment: Last start 2nd of 12 at Catterick on April 8 over 1000m, 0.5 len behind Golden Prosperity carrying 57kg at $8.50. The start before that ran last of 9 at Newcastle All Weather on March 27 over 1200m, 8 len behind Yorkshire Glory carrying 54.5kg at $51. Not far away of late. Among the winning chances.

form.formComment: Returns from a 48-day let-up. Most recently 4th of 10 at Chelmsford on February 26 over 1200m, 4 len behind Henry Tudor carrying 61kg at $4. The race before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 7 at Chelmsford on January 29 over 1200m, 5 len behind Up The Monk with 61kg at $4.60. Major player.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after seven months ran last of 12 at Wolverhampton on March 30 over 1200m, 10 len behind Fircombe Hall carrying 65kg at $126. Previously second-up ran last of 13 at Chepstow on August 14 over 1600m, 72 len behind Ajrad carrying 56.5kg at $81. Not keen.

form.formComment: Resuming today after a break of ten months. Finished off last campaign second last of 8 at Wolverhampton June 10 over 1000m, 7 len behind Henery Hawk carrying 58kg at $4. Previously first up; fifth of 9 at Wolverhampton March 3 2025 over 1000m, 2.25 len behind The Defiant carrying 57.5kg at $41. Certainly one to consider.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Denied a clear run on several occasions from two furlongs out.
Suffered interference approximately half a furlong out.

form.formComment: Comes off a 34 day let-up. Most recently second last of 9 at Newcastle All Weather on March 12 over 1000m, 7 len behind Auntie Jo with 61kg at $6.
